title.rendered: [Free Webinar] How to Acquire New Donors this Year-End

content.rendered:
Date: Tuesday, November 15, 2022
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (1 Hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Janet Cobb, Personal Fundraising Coach at Bonterra

Individual donors are key to the financial success of your nonprofit. So how do you stand out and successfully secure donations during the busiest time for giving?

In this free webinar, Personal Fundraising Coach Janet Cobb will help you better understand where to find prospective donors, how to engage donors during the giving season, and what to do once you receive donations to retain a strong donor base.

<<Register Now>>

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, please register for the webinar to receive the recording 24-48 hours after the webinar is over. Visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.
